error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Perplexity API credential error during connection test
symptom: When testing the Perplexity API credentials, n8n shows a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error. However, the node executes successfully when run manually.
root_cause: This error occurs due to a bug in the display of the credential test results. The test may fail even when the provided API key is valid, leading to confusion for users.
fix_steps: Create a new credential in the Perplexity node
Enter a valid Perplexity API Key
Close the node and manually execute it with a prompt
agent_instruction: Manually execute the Perplexity node with the valid API key despite the credential test error.
